description: Correction to bl-20fc: task_json rendered created/updated through civil::iso8601, breaking the lossless toml->json export (i64 chosen precisely so JSON stays lossless). --json must carry the literal stored i64; ISO-8601 is human display only (show/list). No new flag. Fix task_json + the two timestamp assertions.
title: Read verbs: --json emits literal unix i64 timestamps, not ISO-8601
